name: PHASE-40 C2 (REAL createProject path): boot apiServer; create A (active); create B WHILE A active -> B created + project_state.json written, NOT denied SCOPE_CROSS_PROJECT (creation carve-out on the real flow)
_phase40_note: Closes the scenario-green/real-broken gap for the creation carve-out: drives the ACTUAL createProject flow via POST /api/projects/create on an in-process apiServer (isolated temp root + ephemeral port; S225/S228 pattern). The booted server's default policy is the PHASE-40 one (seam_present). Creating B while A is the active project succeeds (B activated before its init-writes per apiServer.js:883-885; createProject runs in the ambient-null window, not a buildProject seam) so B's artifacts/projects/<B>/project_state.json write is ALLOWED. Complements S331 (policy-level carve-out) and the read-only A.0 trace.
